heading: Authority to release levy and return property
label: 6343 Authority to release levy and return property
notes: Amendments2018—Subsec. (f). added subsec. (f).Pub. L. 115–1232017—Subsec. (b). substituted “2 years” for “9 months” in concluding provisions.Pub. L. 115–971998—Subsec. (d)(2)(D). , substituted “National Taxpayer Advocate” for “Taxpayer Advocate” in two places.Pub. L. 105–206, § 1102(d)(1)(B)Subsec. (e). , added subsec. (e).Pub. L. 105–206, § 3432(a)1996—Subsec. (d). added subsec. (d).Pub. L. 104–1681988—Subsec. (a). inserted “and notice of release” after “levy” in heading and amended text generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “It shall be lawful for the Secretary, under regulations prescribed by the Secretary, to release the levy upon all or part of the property or rights to property levied upon where the Secretary determines that such action will facilitate the collection of the liability, but such release shall not operate to prevent any subsequent levy.”Pub. L. 100–6471986—Subsec. (c). substituted “the overpayment rate established under section 6621” for “an annual rate established under section 6621”.Pub. L. 99–5141979—Subsec. (c). added subsec. (c).Pub. L. 96–1671976— struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary” wherever appearing.Pub. L. 94–4551966— inserted “and return property” in section catchline, designated existing provisions as subsec. (a), and added subsec. (b).Pub. L. 89–719

children.heading: Release of levy and notice of release
children.label: a Release of levy and notice of release
A
children.text: the liability for which such levy was made is satisfied or becomes unenforceable by reason of lapse of time,

children.label: B
children.text: release of such levy will facilitate the collection of such liability,

children.label: C
children.text: the taxpayer has entered into an agreement under section 6159 to satisfy such liability by means of installment payments, unless such agreement provides otherwise,

children.label: D
children.text: the Secretary has determined that such levy is creating an economic hardship due to the financial condition of the taxpayer, or

children.label: E
children.text: the fair market value of the property exceeds such liability and release of the levy on a part of such property could be made without hindering the collection of such liability.

children.heading: Expedited determination on certain business property
children.label: 2 Expedited determination on certain business property
children.text: In the case of any tangible personal property essential in carrying on the trade or business of the taxpayer, the Secretary shall provide for an expedited determination under paragraph (1) if levy on such tangible personal property would prevent the taxpayer from carrying on such trade or business.

children.heading: Subsequent levy
children.label: 3 Subsequent levy
children.text: The release of levy on any property under paragraph (1) shall not prevent any subsequent levy on such property.
the specific property levied upon,
an amount of money equal to the amount of money levied upon, or
an amount of money equal to the amount of money received by the United States from a sale of such property.
in a case described in subsection (b)(2), from the date the Secretary receives the money to a date (to be determined by the Secretary) preceding the date of return by not more than 30 days, or
in a case described in subsection (b)(3), from the date of the sale of the property to a date (to be determined by the Secretary) preceding the date of return by not more than 30 days.

children.heading: Return of property in certain cases
children.label: d Return of property in certain cases

children.text: any property has been levied upon, and

children.label: A
children.text: the levy on such property was premature or otherwise not in accordance with administrative procedures of the Secretary,

children.label: B
children.text: the taxpayer has entered into an agreement under section 6159 to satisfy the tax liability for which the levy was imposed by means of installment payments, unless such agreement provides otherwise,

children.label: C
children.text: the return of such property will facilitate the collection of the tax liability, or

children.label: D
children.text: with the consent of the taxpayer or the National Taxpayer Advocate, the return of such property would be in the best interests of the taxpayer (as determined by the National Taxpayer Advocate) and the United States,

children.heading: Release of levy upon agreement that amount is not collectible
children.label: e Release of levy upon agreement that amount is not collectible
children.text: In the case of a levy on the salary or wages payable to or received by the taxpayer, upon agreement with the taxpayer that the tax is not collectible, the Secretary shall release such levy as soon as practicable.

children.heading: Individuals held harmless on wrongful levy, etc. on retirement plan1So in original. Probably should be followed by a comma.1
children.label: f Individuals held harmless on wrongful levy, etc. on retirement plan1So in original. Probably should be followed by a comma.1
i
children.text: the amount of money so returned by the Secretary, and

children.label: ii
children.text: interest paid under subsection (c) on such amount of money,

children.label: B
children.text: the Secretary shall, at the time such property or amount of money is returned, notify such individual that a contribution described in subparagraph (A) may be made.

children.label: A
children.text: the contribution shall be treated as having been made for the taxable year in which the distribution on account of the levy occurred, and the interest paid under subsection (c) shall be treated as earnings within the plan after the contribution and shall not be included in gross income, and

children.label: B
children.text: such contribution shall not be taken into account under section 408(d)(3)(B).

children.heading: Refund, etc., of income tax on levy
children.label: 3 Refund, etc., of income tax on levy

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: If any amount is includible in gross income for a taxable year by reason of a distribution on account of a levy referred to in paragraph (1) and any portion of such amount is treated as a rollover contribution under paragraph (2), any tax imposed by chapter 1 on such portion shall not be assessed, and if assessed shall be abated, and if collected shall be credited or refunded as an overpayment made on the due date for filing the return of tax for such taxable year.

children.heading: Exception
children.label: B Exception
children.text: Subparagraph (A) shall not apply to a rollover contribution under this subsection which is made from an eligible retirement plan which is not a Roth IRA or a designated Roth account (within the meaning of section 402A) to a Roth IRA or a designated Roth account under an eligible retirement plan.

children.heading: Interest
children.label: 4 Interest
children.text: Notwithstanding subsection (d), interest shall be allowed under subsection (c) in a case in which the Secretary makes a determination described in subsection (d)(2)(A) with respect to a levy upon an individual retirement plan.

children.heading: Treatment of inherited accounts
children.label: 5 Treatment of inherited accounts
children.text: For purposes of paragraph (1)(A), section 408(d)(3)(C) shall be disregarded in determining whether an individual retirement plan is a plan to which a rollover contribution of a distribution from the plan levied upon is permitted.
